description: Scheduling and booking API for meetings, contacts, booking types, and team calendars.

tools.name: booking-types_create
tools.description: Create a new booking type. Required: description, duration_minutes, title, url_slug. Optional: approval_required, booking_availability_interval_minutes (default: 15), booking_type_category_id (plus 10 more). Returns the new BookingTypesCreateResponse.

params.name: currency_code
params.description: ISO 4217 currency code (e.g. USD, EUR, GBP). Defaults to your account currency.

params.name: payment_platform
params.description: Payment platform to use. The platform must be connected in your account Integrations settings. Required when price > 0.

params.name: price
params.description: Price for the booking type. Set to 0 for free booking types.

tools.name: booking-types_list
tools.description: Get a list of booking types. Required: page (default: 1). Returns array of BookingType.

tools.name: booking-types_bookings_create
tools.description: Create a new booking for a specific booking type. **Single vs Package Bookings:** - For single bookings, use `starts_at` to specify the booking time - For package/multi-session bookings, use the `bookings` array to specify multiple time slots **Response Format:** - Single booking: Returns `{'data': {Booking}}` - Multiple bookings (package): Returns `{'data': [{Booking}, ...]}`. Required: bookingType, email, name, timezone. Optional: booking_questions, bookings, starts_at.

params.name: bookingType
params.description: The ID of the booking type.

params.name: bookings
params.description: Array of booking times for package/multi-session bookings. If provided, `starts_at` is ignored.

params.name: email
params.description: Email of the person making the booking

params.name: name
params.description: Name of the person making the booking

params.name: starts_at
params.description: The start time of the booking in UTC. Required for single bookings. Ignored if `bookings` array is provided.

tools.name: booking-types_timeslots_list-booking-type
tools.description: Get a list of available timeslots for a specific booking type. Required: bookingType, starts_at, ends_at. Returns array of Timeslot.

params.name: bookingType
params.description: The ID of the booking type.

params.name: starts_at
params.description: Start date to get timeslots from (UTC).

params.name: ends_at
params.description: End date to get timeslots until (UTC).

tools.name: bookings_get
tools.description: Get a booking by ID. Required: booking. Returns array of Question.

tools.name: bookings_list
tools.description: Get a list of bookings. Required: starts_at, ends_at, cancelled, page (default: 1), include_teams. Returns array of Booking.

params.name: starts_at
params.description: Get bookings starting from a specific date.

params.name: ends_at
params.description: Get bookings ending before a specific date.

tools.name: bookings_cancel_booking
tools.description: Cancel a booking by ID. Required: booking. Optional: reason. Returns array of Question.

params.name: booking
params.description: The ID of the booking to cancel.

tools.name: contacts_create
tools.description: Create a new contact. Required: email, name. Optional: timezone. Returns the new ContactsCreateResponse.

tools.name: contacts_list
tools.description: Get a list of contacts. Required: page (default: 1). Returns array of Contact.

tools.name: me_get-account
tools.description: Get account details. Returns the User.

tools.name: teams_get
tools.description: Get details of a specific team. Required: team. Returns the Team.

tools.name: teams_list
tools.description: Get a list of teams the authenticated user has access to. Required: page (default: 1). Returns array of Team.

tools.name: teams_booking-types_create-team
tools.description: Create a new booking type for a specific team. Required: team, description, duration_minutes, title, url_slug. Optional: approval_required, booking_availability_interval_minutes (default: 15), booking_type_category_id (plus 10 more). Returns the new BookingTypesCreateTeamResponse.

params.name: currency_code
params.description: ISO 4217 currency code (e.g. USD, EUR, GBP). Defaults to your account currency.

params.name: payment_platform
params.description: Payment platform to use. The platform must be connected in your account Integrations settings. Required when price > 0.

params.name: price
params.description: Price for the booking type. Set to 0 for free booking types.

tools.name: teams_booking-types_list-team
tools.description: Get a list of booking types for a specific team. Required: team. Optional: page. Returns array of BookingType.

tools.name: teams_bookings_list-team
tools.description: Get a list of bookings for a specific team. Required: team. Optional: page, start_date, end_date (plus 3 more). Returns array of Booking.

params.name: start_date
params.description: Get bookings starting from a specific date.

params.name: end_date
params.description: Get bookings ending before a specific date.

params.name: email
params.description: Get bookings for a specific email address.

params.name: host_id
params.description: Get bookings for a specific user ID.

params.name: cancelled
params.description: Filter by cancellation status. Use true for cancelled bookings, false for non-cancelled bookings, or omit for all bookings.

tools.name: teams_users_add-team
tools.description: Add a user to a team by sending an invitation email. Required: team, email. Optional: role_name. Returns the new UsersAddTeamResponse.

params.name: email
params.description: Email address of the user to invite

params.name: role_name
params.description: Role name for the user in the team

tools.name: teams_users_list-team
tools.description: Get a list of users in a specific team. Required: team, page (default: 1). Returns array of TeamUser.

tools.name: teams_users_remove-team
tools.description: Remove a user from a team. Required: team, teamUser. Returns the UsersRemoveTeamResponse. Destructive.

params.name: teamUser
params.description: The ID of the team user to remove.
